creator: niederacher@fh-vorarlberg.ac.at
text:
When make runs in the krb5 directory libtool fails with
"libtool: link: only absolute run-paths are allowed".

How-To-Repeat: According to an unreplied message in the freebsd-ports mailing
list (May 12, 2001 from Toni.Heinonen@teleware.fi) it seems to
happen on multiple machines
